title: glechoma mariae
intro: Glechoma mariae, also known as creeping thyme or creeping savory, is a low-growing, spreading herb native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Glechoma mariae include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, and aiding digestion. The herbal preparations of Glechoma mariae include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make medicinal remedies, such as treating sore throats and colds.
